disruptions.description: PrimeSource Industries is experiencing a 10-day delay due to unexpected machinery breakdown at their main production facility in Germany.
EastBridge Supplies factory in China has been ordered to close for 30 days due to regulatory safety violations found during a government inspection.
SunCoast Trading in India is operating at only 40% capacity due to worker strikes affecting their main warehouse and dispatch center.
FastTrack Manufacturing has issued a quality hold on all outgoing shipments after a batch failure was detected. All orders on hold pending investigation.
PacificRim Partners in Vietnam has filed for bankruptcy protection. All operations are suspended indefinitely. Orders must be immediately rerouted.
New trade sanctions have been imposed on Brazil affecting GlobalEdge Manufacturing. All imports are blocked pending government clearance.
MedTerra Exports is facing minor port congestion in Spain causing 5-day delays on all sea shipments. Air freight alternative available.
BridgePoint Supply in Turkey is at 60% capacity after a fire damaged one of their three production lines. Partial fulfillment possible.
